name: 4pk 8.5 fl oz Cocktail Glass Set - Threshold™
description:
Celebrate your treasured moments in style with this 4-Pack Cocktail Glass Set from Threshold™. This set includes four coupe glasses in a clear hue that elevate the appearance of your favorite drinks. Made of glass, these 8.5-fluid-ounce glasses are ideal for serving various cold beverages, and they are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
